_comment: Documented compat deltas. Each entry suppresses a matching DiffRecord from the active section of summary.md and surfaces it under '## Suppressed (known deltas)' with its reason + regressionTest. See docs/registry/api-compat-deltas.md.

deltas.reason: v3 deprecates the legacy cache-update endpoint with 410 Gone + ErrorResponse body. Cache is rebuilt on service startup via @PostConstruct in ComponentsRegistryServiceImpl.cloneVcsData(); explicit re-cache via PUT is no longer supported. baselineValue intentionally omitted: under parallel test load the V1 baseline can transport-fail this heavy operation (Git DSL re-clone) before the HTTP client's timeout — the delta has the same root cause (intentional deprecation) regardless of whether baseline answers 200 or transport-fails (0). id17 #3666 reproduced the transport-failure variant on v3 at default parallelism. Confirmed intentional 2026-05-15.

Symptom of the STATUS_CODE_DIFF entry above — when the V1 baseline transport-fails the heavy /updateCache call under parallel load, no response headers come back and only candidate (which answers 410 with a JSON ErrorResponse body) reports a content-type. Suppressed together with the status-code deprecation delta.
